items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

Approval of Consent Items

Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Hatchuel Tabernik and Associates for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Redwood City PAL for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Catalyst Family Inc. for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the First Amendment between the Redwood City School District and Redwood City PAL for the 2023-2024 School Year
Approval of the Employment Contract for Chief Business Official
Approval of the Employment Contract for Deputy Superintendent
Approval of the Citizens' Bond Oversight Committee Membership
Approval of Personnel Report
Approval of Disbursement of Measure U Funds for the 2024-2025 School Year for Taft Community School
Approval of Disbursement of Measure U Funds for the 2024-2025 School Year for Connect Community Charter School
Approval of Disbursement of Measure U Funds for the 2024-2025 School Year for Rocketship Redwood City Prep

Approval of Facilities Use Agreement between Redwood City School District and Connect Community Charter School, for the 2024-25 School Year
Approval of Facilities Use Agreement between Redwood City School District and Rocketship Redwood City Prep Charter School, for the 2024-25 School Year
Adoption of Resolution No. 12, Approval of Education Code Options for Teaching Assignments 2024-2025 School Year
Adoption of Resolution No. 13, a Resolution of the Redwood City School District Calling for an Election to be Held on November 5, 2024, for the Election of 3 Members of the Governing Board
Adoption of Resolution No. 14, The Education Protection Account for Fiscal Year 2024-25
Approval of Local Interagency Agreement(s) to Provide Education and Training to Credential Candidates
Approval of the Redwood City Administrators Association (RCAA) Compensation Proposal
Approval of the Local Control Accountability Plan (LCAP) for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of the 2024-2025 Proposed Budget for Redwood City School District
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Contract Update Information and Credit Card Summary
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting
